suggestions.title: Finish the three missing policy-gradient cells in homework3 before rerunning CartPole
suggestions.description: `策略梯度/homework3/3-策略梯度.ipynb` was edited recently on June 16, 2026, but it still has `Programming 1/2/3` placeholders and zero executed code cells. This is the clearest live open loop in this RL project, and Codex can complete the notebook and make the training run end to end.
suggestions.prompt: Complete the missing `Programming 1`, `Programming 2`, and `Programming 3` sections in `策略梯度/homework3/3-策略梯度.ipynb`, keep it compatible with the current Gym/Gymnasium-style API already used later in the notebook, and run through the CartPole training cells so the notebook produces a reasonable learning curve.
